mapper.select: SELECT chat_id, user_id, session_type, context_type, context_id, title, delete_flag, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM ai_chat_session WHERE chat_id = #{chatId} AND delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT chat_id, user_id, session_type, context_type, context_id, title, delete_flag, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM ai_chat_session WHERE chat_id = #{chatId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT chat_id, user_id, session_type, context_type, context_id, title, delete_flag, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM ai_chat_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_type = 'CHAT' AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY gmt_modified DESC, gmt_create DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_session ( chat_id, user_id, session_type, context_type, context_id, title, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{chatId}, #{userId}, #{sessionType}, #{contextType}, #{contextId}, #{title}, #{deleteFlag} )
INSERT INTO ai_chat_message ( chat_id, user_id, role, content, message_status, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{chatId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{messageStatus}, #{deleteFlag} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, chat_id, user_id, role, content, message_status, delete_flag, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM ai_chat_message WHERE chat_id = #{chatId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY gmt_create ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, chat_id, user_id, role, content, message_status, delete_flag, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM ai_chat_message WHERE chat_id = #{chatId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY gmt_create DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, question, answer, pest_id, crop_id, delete_flag, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM lightweight_knowledge_base_enhanced_qa WHERE delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT name FROM crop WHERE id = #{cropId} AND delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT name FROM pest WHERE id = #{pestId} AND delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT symptoms FROM pest WHERE id = #{pestId} AND delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, category, intro, description, image_url, delete_flag, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM crop WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, type, description, symptoms, cause, prevention, risk_level, season, delete_flag, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM pest WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, title, crop_id, pest_id, risk_level, warning_type, warning_date, rule_id, delete_flag, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM warning WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT w.id AS warning_id, w.title AS warning_title, w.crop_id AS crop_id, c.name AS crop_name, w.pest_id AS pest_id, p.name AS pest_name, p.type AS pest_type, p.symptoms AS symptoms, w.risk_level AS risk_level, w.warning_type AS warning_type, w.warning_date AS warning_date, w.rule_id AS rule_id, r.rule_name AS rule_name, r.suggestion AS suggestion FROM warning w INNER JOIN crop c ON w.crop_id = c.id AND c.delete_flag = 0 INNER JOIN pest p ON w.pest_id = p.id AND p.delete_flag = 0 INNER JOIN prewarning_rules r ON w.rule_id = r.id AND r.delete_flag = 0 WHERE w.id = #{warningId} AND w.delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE ai_chat_message
content = #{content},
message_status = #{messageStatus},
gmt_modified = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, chat_id, user_id, role, content, message_status, delete_flag, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM ai_chat_message WHERE chat_id = #{chatId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND role = 'assistant' AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY gmt_create DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
